data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for category tagging.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for category tagging (cosmetic, functional, safety) within the context of the saga. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence of functionality for category tagging. The only related evidence is a summary of the use case, which does not demonstrate that the system can perform category tagging as specified.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for category tagging.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for category tagging.
